role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Strictly analyzed Portuguese text ('Auto Posto', 'Rodovia') and script.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color (red latosol), and vegetation structure.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified Cerrado biome characteristics and soil-vegetation association.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings, signage standards, and fuel types.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure details (utility poles, price board layout) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified Brazil through linguistic and regulatory markers, supported by landscape and botanical cues.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: All cited Portuguese terms are clearly visible on the sign.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Red soil and flat terrain accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Cerrado vegetation description matches the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road markings and sign content accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Infrastructure details (poles, board style) accurately described.
